scripts.audit: bash -c 'if [ -n "$1" ]; then cd "services/$1" && npx --yes audit-ci --high --allowlist GHSA-mvf2-f6gm-w987 --allowlist GHSA-hm7r-c7qw-ghp6; else for d in services/*/; do echo "=== $d ===" && (cd "$d" && npx --yes audit-ci --high --allowlist GHSA-mvf2-f6gm-w987 --allowlist GHSA-hm7r-c7qw-ghp6); done; fi' --
